/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/matrixstuff_benchmarking.dir/tests/doctest_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/matrixstuff_benchmarking.dir/tests/ipv_benchmarking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/matrixstuff_benchmarking.dir/ipv.cpp.o -o matrixstuff_benchmarking
